title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at MBD Group Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at MBD Group Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the MBD Group Global Group family as a Teacher in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MBD Group Global Group:
MBD Group Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group Global Group!
